      { toFun := f, invFun := g, left_inv := h₁, right_inv := h₂ }.toFun x +
        { toFun := f, invFun := g, left_inv := h₁, right_inv := h₂ }.toFun y
⊢ { toFun := f, invFun := g, left_inv := h₁, right_inv := h₂, map_mul' := h₃, map_add' := h₄ }.symm =
    let __src := symm_mk.aux f g h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄;
